novel The Squatter and the Don. Mercedes and Clarence, who develop a
romantic relationship in the novel, have been traveling with a group of friends.
[Mercedes] was still very pale, and her hands yet trembled, when the

shrieks pierced the air simultaneously, as the two trains passed each

shrieks, because she knew that one of them came from the train
which bore Clarence away, and it seemed to her as if expressive of
